package rulecoverage

func PositiveGinHandlerUsesGlobalSingletons() string {
    ruleID := "gin_handler_uses_global_singletons"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Handlers that reach for global DB, logger, cache, or config variables instead of injected dependencies."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
